panels.description: Unique sandbox IDs (blob1) seen in the selected window. AE preserves true unique values across sampling, so this is exact — not extrapolated.

targets.query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion)

panels.title: Distinct Sandboxes

panels.description: Unique fly machine IDs (blob8) seen in the selected window. Excludes empty machine IDs (early-boot rows).

targets.query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob8) AS machines FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != ''
targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob8) AS machines FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != ''

panels.title: Distinct Machines

panels.description: Linux 5-min load average across selected check-ins. Compare against host CPU count; values approaching the CPU count indicate saturation.

targets.query:
SELECT AVG(double4) AS avg_load FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT AVG(double4) AS avg_load FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion)

panels.title: Avg Load

panels.description: Average machine uptime (seconds) across selected check-ins.

targets.query:
SELECT AVG(double3) AS avg_uptime_seconds FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT AVG(double3) AS avg_uptime_seconds FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion)

panels.title: Avg Uptime

panels.description: Check-in volume (sample-corrected) split by supervisor state (blob6). Useful to see if a state is gaining or losing membership.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob6 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS checkins FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob6 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS checkins FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Check-ins by Supervisor State

panels.description: Mean 5-min Linux load average per supervisor state. Compare against the typical CPU count of the host class.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob6 AS label, AVG(double4) AS avg_load FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob6 AS label, AVG(double4) AS avg_load FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Average Load by Supervisor State

panels.description: Mean machine uptime per supervisor state. A drop means many machines were recently (re)started.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob6 AS label, AVG(double3) AS avg_uptime_seconds FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob6 AS label, AVG(double3) AS avg_uptime_seconds FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Average Uptime by Supervisor State

panels.description: Sample-corrected check-ins reporting supervisor_state = crashed. Use this to spot crash spikes.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, 'crashed' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS crashed_checkins FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  AND blob6 = 'crashed'
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, 'crashed' AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS crashed_checkins FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  AND blob6 = 'crashed'
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Crashed Check-ins

panels.description: Distribution of supervisor states across check-ins, sample-corrected.

targets.query:
SELECT blob6 AS supervisor_state, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY supervisor_state ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob6 AS supervisor_state, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) GROUP BY supervisor_state ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Supervisor State Distribution

panels.description: Top hosts by total bandwidth (sample-corrected via _sample_interval). Bandwidth columns render in IEC bytes (KiB/MiB/GiB).

targets.query:
SELECT blob8 AS host, blob1 AS sandbox_id, SUM(_sample_interval * double5) AS total_bandwidth_in_bytes, SUM(_sample_interval * double6) AS total_bandwidth_out_bytes, MAX(timestamp) AS last_checkin FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != '' GROUP BY host, sandbox_id HAVING total_bandwidth_in_bytes > 0 OR total_bandwidth_out_bytes > 0 ORDER BY total_bandwidth_out_bytes DESC, total_bandwidth_in_bytes DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob8 AS host, blob1 AS sandbox_id, SUM(_sample_interval * double5) AS total_bandwidth_in_bytes, SUM(_sample_interval * double6) AS total_bandwidth_out_bytes, MAX(timestamp) AS last_checkin FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != '' GROUP BY host, sandbox_id HAVING total_bandwidth_in_bytes > 0 OR total_bandwidth_out_bytes > 0 ORDER BY total_bandwidth_out_bytes DESC, total_bandwidth_in_bytes DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Host Bandwidth Deltas

panels.description: 100 most recent raw check-ins with full dimensional context. Useful for ad-hoc debugging of a specific sandbox.

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS sandbox_id, blob8 AS machine_id, blob7 AS fly_region, blob2 AS controller_version, blob4 AS openclaw_version, blob6 AS supervisor_state, double2 AS total_restarts, double3 AS uptime_seconds, double4 AS load_avg_5m, double5 AS bandwidth_in_delta_bytes, double6 AS bandwidth_out_delta_bytes, blob9 AS last_exit_reason FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS sandbox_id, blob8 AS machine_id, blob7 AS fly_region, blob2 AS controller_version, blob4 AS openclaw_version, blob6 AS supervisor_state, double2 AS total_restarts, double3 AS uptime_seconds, double4 AS load_avg_5m, double5 AS bandwidth_in_delta_bytes, double6 AS bandwidth_out_delta_bytes, blob9 AS last_exit_reason FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Latest Check-ins

panels.description: Average disk fill percentage (double7 / double8) across selected hosts. Climbs toward 100% indicate hosts at risk of running out of space. Extrapolation is disabled because this is an AVG of a ratio — extrapolating the last partial bucket would distort the value rather than estimate a missing tail.

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob7 AS label, AVG(double7 / double8) AS disk_fill FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND double8 > 0 GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawSql:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob7 AS label, AVG(double7 / double8) AS disk_fill FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND double8 > 0 GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Disk Fill % by Region

panels.description: Hosts ranked by peak disk fill percentage in the selected window. Investigate any row > 90%.

targets.query:
SELECT blob8 AS host, blob1 AS sandbox_id, MAX(double7) AS peak_disk_used_bytes, MAX(double8) AS disk_total_bytes, MAX(double7) / MAX(double8) AS peak_disk_fill, MAX(timestamp) AS last_checkin FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != '' AND double8 > 0 GROUP BY host, sandbox_id ORDER BY peak_disk_fill DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob8 AS host, blob1 AS sandbox_id, MAX(double7) AS peak_disk_used_bytes, MAX(double8) AS disk_total_bytes, MAX(double7) / MAX(double8) AS peak_disk_fill, MAX(timestamp) AS last_checkin FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != '' AND double8 > 0 GROUP BY host, sandbox_id ORDER BY peak_disk_fill DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Hosts by Disk Fill

panels.description: Top reasons reported in blob9 (last_exit_reason). Spikes in 'oom_killed' / 'signal_killed' / non-zero exit codes are the first thing to look at after a regression.

targets.query:
SELECT blob9 AS last_exit_reason, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count, COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS distinct_sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob9 != '' GROUP BY last_exit_reason ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob9 AS last_exit_reason, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count, COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS distinct_sandboxes FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob9 != '' GROUP BY last_exit_reason ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Exit Reasons

panels.description: Restart delta (MAX(double2) - MIN(double2)) per host over the selected window — how many restarts occurred during the window, inferred from the change in the cumulative counter. Use to identify flapping machines.

targets.query:
SELECT blob8 AS host, blob1 AS sandbox_id, MAX(double2) AS max_total_restarts, MAX(double2) - MIN(double2) AS restart_delta, MAX(timestamp) AS last_checkin FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != '' GROUP BY host, sandbox_id HAVING restart_delta > 0 ORDER BY restart_delta DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawSql:
SELECT blob8 AS host, blob1 AS sandbox_id, MAX(double2) AS max_total_restarts, MAX(double2) - MIN(double2) AS restart_delta, MAX(timestamp) AS last_checkin FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND index1 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob6 IN ($supervisorState),, $supervisorState)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob7 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 IN ($controllerVersion),, $controllerVersion) AND blob8 != '' GROUP BY host, sandbox_id HAVING restart_delta > 0 ORDER BY restart_delta DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Hosts by Restart Delta

list.definition: SELECT blob6 FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE blob6 != '' GROUP BY blob6 ORDER BY blob6
list.label: Supervisor State
list.name: supervisorState
list.query: SELECT blob6 FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE blob6 != '' GROUP BY blob6 ORDER BY blob6

list.definition: SELECT blob7 FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE blob7 != '' GROUP BY blob7 ORDER BY blob7
list.label: Fly Region
list.name: flyRegion
list.query: SELECT blob7 FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE blob7 != '' GROUP BY blob7 ORDER BY blob7

list.definition: SELECT blob2 FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE blob2 != '' GROUP BY blob2 ORDER BY blob2
list.label: Controller Version
list.name: controllerVersion
list.query: SELECT blob2 FROM kiloclaw_controller_telemetry WHERE blob2 != '' GROUP BY blob2 ORDER BY blob2
